summary: Restore live permission sidebar drag sorting with dnd-kit, frame-batched updates, and jitter-resistant reorder thresholds.

notes: No database schema or permission migration is included in this release.
Replaced native HTML drag/drop sorting in the permission configuration sidebar list with dnd-kit sortable interactions.
Sidebar resources now preview their order while dragging, with row-center based insertion, requestAnimationFrame batching, and an 8px hysteresis threshold to avoid boundary jitter.
Dragging is limited to the grip handle so permission level selects remain normal controls.
Added stable DOM test IDs for the sortable list, sortable rows, and drag handles.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.49 and production VITE variables, sync frontend/dist, then rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.16.49.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.49 and the production VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against the deployed site.
